prompt: Place the uploaded subject naturally at the center of the frame inside a dramatic glass fisheye bubble, shot from a low-angle close perspective that warps and curves the surroundings into a bold, immersive composition. The scene should feel like a branded universe built entirely around [BRAND NAME] — a sleek workspace, a vibrant retail environment, a creative studio, or an experiential pop-up — chosen to reflect the spirit and identity of [BRAND NAME]. One to two young, confident individuals are captured mid-action, extending or presenting a brand-relevant object directly toward the fisheye lens, creating an intimate and dynamic point of contact between subject and viewer. The environment, props, and every visual element in the scene must respond entirely to [BRAND NAME]. Typography dominates the composition with a sweeping, oversized [BRAND NAME] word or phrase arching in a bold curve around the outer edge of the frame. The background maintains a warm cream paper tone throughout, giving the image a tactile, print-inspired quality. A vivid cyan orbital ring or track traces around or behind the central bubble.
